title: Warden of the Assembly Line
description: The Warden stands at the entrance to the great manufactory floor. A figure of brass and steam, announcing a stress test.

lines: The manufactory floor was the size of a cathedral and louder than one. Conveyor belts moved in every direction carrying things that had no clear beginning and no visible destination.
The Warden stood at the center where the belts converged, a figure made partly of clockwork and partly of something that had decided to be clockwork. It did not breathe so much as pressurize.
When it spoke, the nearby gears slowed to listen.

lines.speaker: Warden of the Assembly Line
lines.text: Classification pending. All unregistered elements entering the manufactory are units until classification is complete. Classification requires stress testing.

lines.speaker: Warden of the Assembly Line
lines.text: You have exceeded the parameters of every stress test run in this facility. The Warden of the Old Guard filed a report. The Warden of Routine filed a report. Both reports were anomalous.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: We've been stress-tested before. In a cave. By someone who offered us dinner first.

lines.speaker: Warden of the Assembly Line
lines.text: Noted. The stress test will not offer dinner. The manufactory has no dining facility. Budget was reallocated to efficiency improvements in Q3.

lines.speaker: Warden of the Assembly Line
lines.text: Stress test parameters: survivability, endurance, load capacity, failure threshold. If you exceed failure threshold, I will update the parameters. This is standard procedure.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: Has anything ever exceeded your failure threshold?

lines.speaker: Warden of the Assembly Line
lines.text: No. I find this informative. COMMENCING.
